title: Utan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Utan, with a Z-Score of +3.66. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Utan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 70% and wind speed is at 4.4 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
